title: Senior Data Analytics Project Manager (m,f,x)
required_skills: Master Degree in Business / Management / Economics / Engineering or related field
3-5 years experience leading projects (startup / tech / digital industry)
Project manager / technical project manager / scrum master experience in agile environment
Familiarity with agile frameworks and hands-on practice
MS Office skills — Excel and PowerPoint
Highly organized with strong deadline management
Experience in analytics / digital growth / operations
matched_skills: Power BI PL-300 + analytics roles — number-driven profile
Campaign performance optimisation / e-commerce & campaign ROI analytics
C-level data storytelling (HSBC PMO — stakeholder bridge)
Programme analytics ownership (USD 8M programme at HSBC)
missing_skills: PowerPoint not explicitly listed in CV tools
Explicit 3-5 year record of independently LEADING (not supporting) large marketing analytics projects — current experience is coordination / PMO / working-student level
No explicit marketing analytics PM title in prior roles
core_responsibilities: Own and lead marketing analytics projects end-to-end with high business impact
Coordinate across multiple international marketing, analytics, and tech teams across time zones
Maintain highly organized and accurate project documentation and quality output
Develop and maintain effective workflows and process frameworks
Identify process optimisation opportunities to improve customer retention and acquisition
recommended_emphasis: Reframe HSBC Strategy PMO as project ownership — USD 8M programme, end-to-end delivery
Highlight Scrum and SAFe practice explicitly with concrete sprint/delivery examples
Emphasize cross-geo coordination (EMEA, APAC multi-market work) to match international team requirement
Lead with marketing analytics PM framing: campaign ROI, funnel analysis, KPI framework — not pure analyst
Add PowerPoint / presentation skills to tools or bullets (HSBC C-level storytelling implies it)
Quantify project timelines and deadlines managed to reinforce organized / deadline-focused profile

company_info.size_raw: JD mentions 'Global community of 90+ nationalities' — no explicit employee count. Orchestrator context indicates 5,001–10,000 range (listed European tech company). No company_url provided for LinkedIn lookup.
